title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends Searches For Emergency Dental Care Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Xly
thesis: A sudden increase in emergency dental care searches often precedes discretionary spending rebounds after stress periods. Consumer discretionary spending tends to rebound as urgent health-related stress eases.
signal_logic: Enter long XLY if weekly search interest for 'emergency dental care' rises by 15%+ over prior 2 weeks
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLY if weekly search interest for 'emergency dental care' rises by 15%+ over prior 2 weeks Exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if interest falls below prior 2-week average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly searches via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Dental emergency searches fluctuate often with consumer stress cycles and will reliably spike multiple times yearly.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'emergency dental care' signals consumer stress lifting XLY
schema.behavior: A sudden increase in emergency dental care searches often precedes discretionary spending rebounds after stress periods.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary spending tends to rebound as urgent health-related stress eases.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY if weekly search interest for 'emergency dental care' rises by 15%+ over prior 2 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if interest falls below prior 2-week average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Dental emergency searches fluctuate often with consumer stress cycles and will reliably spike multiple times yearly.

title: Daily Spike In Usgs Earthquake Activity Near Major Ports Signals Short-term Freight Logistics Disruption And Bearish Xli
thesis: Increased earthquake activity near ports tends to temporarily disrupt freight logistics and shipping schedules. Freight logistics stocks get pressured by potential shipment delays and infrastructure concerns.
signal_logic: Enter short XLI if daily earthquake count near top 5 US ports rises 50%+ above 30-day moving average
entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLI if daily earthquake count near top 5 US ports rises 50%+ above 30-day moving average Exit: Exit after 7 trading days or once daily counts normalize
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use USGS earthquake activity daily counts via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake clusters near ports occur regularly and create predictable short-term freight disruptions.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or once daily counts normalize
